certificate.module_name: Ovation FIPS Provider based on the OpenSSL FIPS Provider
certificate.caveat: When operated in approved mode. No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys).
certificate.description: The Ovation FIPS Provider based on the OpenSSL FIPS Provider is a software library providing a C-language application program interface (API) for use by applications that require cryptographic functionality.
